title: Lycopodioides cladorrhizans
taxonomy: Lycopodioides cladorrhizans is classified within the division Lycopodiophyta, which is a group of vascular plants commonly known as club mosses. This division is further divided into two classes, Lycopodiopsida and Selaginellopsida. Lycopodioides cladorrhizans specifically belongs to the class Lycopodiopsida, which includes the orders Lycopodiales and Selaginellales. The order Lycopodiales contains the family Lycopodiaceae, and the genus Lycopodioides is a member of this family. Within the genus Lycopodioides, L. cladorrhizans is a distinct species.
uses: Lycopodioides cladorrhizans is a species of club moss, and like other members of its genus, it has been found to have potential medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may be useful in treating various health conditions.
